qa_pairs.question: How does a user launch an interactive application through Open OnDemand, and what job parameters can they configure during the submission process?
qa_pairs.answer: To launch an interactive application, navigate to the ''Interactive Apps'' tab, select the desired application from the drop-down, and then choose job parameters such as the length of the job in hours, the number of cores, the amount of memory to allocate (GB), and whether to receive an email notification when the job starts. After setting parameters, click ''Launch'' and then ''Connect to...'' once the job is running.

qa_pairs.question: If an interactive Open OnDemand job encounters an error, where can a user find diagnostic information, and what details are required when submitting a support ticket to SciNet?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can find diagnostic information by navigating to the ''My Interactive Sessions'' tab, locating their active session, and clicking on the output.log link to view standard output and error messages. When submitting a ticket to SciNet support, users should include the output.log file, their ''Session ID'', and any other relevant information.
